action.reasoning: Observation: I have best.pt (val 0.849, epoch 14) and m1.pt (val 0.849, EMA epoch 11) — both from iter 16. The previous best 0.8595 ensemble checkpoints were overwritten. Current pair is from a single training run (different epochs of same seed) — less diverse than two seeds. Analysis: Need to add more diverse models. Train new model with different seed, save as m2.pt, then ensemble 3 models. Decision: Modify train.py to save with custom name to avoid overwriting, train new seed=123 model, save as m2.pt. Then submit eval with 3-model ensemble.
action.command: SEED=123 SAVE_NAME=m2.pt EMA_SAVE_NAME=m3.pt EPOCHS=18 python train2.py
